lines: Population. The USA leads with 340 million. Russia has 144 million.
GDP. The US dominates at 28.8 trillion dollars. Russia has just 2.2 trillion.
Land Area. Russia is the largest country on Earth. 17.1 million square kilometers. The US has 9.8 million.
Nuclear Warheads. Russia leads with 5,977 warheads. The USA has 5,550.
Military Personnel. Russia has 1.3 million active. The US has 1.4 million. USA wins.
Olympic Gold Medals. The USA leads with 1,180 golds. Russia has 596.
Oil Production. The USA produces 13 million barrels per day. Russia produces 10.8 million.
Space Achievements. Both pioneered space exploration. Russia was first to space. The USA landed on the moon.
The final score. Five to three. The USA wins!

seo.title: USA vs Russia — Who ACTUALLY Wins? 🇺🇸🇷🇺
